channel.title: Interpretability on Research Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Interpretability on Research Portfolio

item.title: Safety Reasoning Models for Interpretability and Jailbreak Diagnostics
item.description:
Problem

Placeholder: need for interpretable safety diagnostics and reasoning over jailbreak points.

Why the problem is hard

Placeholder: why teaching explicit reasoning and mining preference pairs from reasoning traces are difficult.

System design

Placeholder: SFT for reasoning + intent → preference mining from perturbations and bad traces → DPO.

Architecture diagram

Implementation details

Placeholder: reasoning format, intent labels, perturbation strategy, DPO data pipeline.

Experiments

Placeholder: diagnostic accuracy, reasoning quality, alignment metrics.
